scope: Saga Edition Web Enhancement 1 / Tech Specialist feat implementation accuracy. This audit separates a working customization service from complete rules-accurate implementation.

sourceReviewQueue.name: Tech Specialist
sourceReviewQueue.reason: The customization service is substantial, but exact source fidelity still needs targeted verification for source attribution, non-source trait separation, no-Take-10 enforcement for the base feat, downtime/helper handling, market-value metadata, and derived-math parity for all trait targets.
